title: Leave Me Alone!
description: Server-side mod that allows players to exclude themselves from @a and @e
body:
# Leave Me Alone!

This mod is for use on servers where the @a and @e commands are commonly used by the admins for events and other fun things, some players may not want to participate in these events and this will allow them to exclude themselves.

## Usage

Exclude yourself from @a / @e (Toggle)
```
/leaveMeAlone
```

(Admin only) Remove all excluded players
```
/clearExcludedPlayers
```
